news.headline: Hinen to exhibit energy storage tech at Powerelec Nigeria 2025 on Jan 13-15 in Lagos, spotlighting advanced solutions.
news.summary: In Lagos, Nigeria, the Powerelec Nigeria 2025 exhibition is set to take place from January 13 to 15, 2025, at the Eko Atlantic City Landmark Centre. This event will gather key players from the West African and global power energy sector, showcasing the latest innovations and trends. Experts in residential energy will participate, shining a spotlight on the industry.

news.headline: After 12-hour delay in Berlin, mother & daughter struggle to get flight compensation from Ryanair for US bank account.
news.summary: Following a 12-hour delay in Berlin, a mother and her daughter were entitled to compensation and a new flight. However, instead of receiving the assistance they needed, they were met with unhelpful and confusing replies from the customer service team.

news.headline: Three indie coffee shops, owned by grads with 0 degrees, thrived with pure determination. TikTok critic Keith Lee boost.
news.summary: The business owners started their ventures without any college degrees, relying solely on determination. Their perseverance paid off when the popular TikTok food critic Keith Lee visited their establishment, further boosting their success.

news.headline: Germany's jobless rate slightly up in Dec, below forecasts.
Mark Cuban favored Ethereum over Bitcoin, predicting higher upside potential. If invested $1000 in each, ETH would have returned more.
news.summary: Renowned billionaire investor and Dallas Mavericks co-owner Mark Cuban, recognized for his firm belief in cryptocurrencies, has made significant investments in top players like Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH), as well as the popular meme coin, Dogecoin (DOGE). Despite discussing various cryptocurrencies, Cuban has shown a strong preference for Ethereum. In an interview with CNBC in October 2021, he highlighted Ether as the cryptocurrency with the highest potential for growth, stating, "As an investment, I think Ethereum has the most upside." Cuban also mentioned that while he views Bitcoin as "better gold than gold," he favors Ether for investment purposes. Additionally, during a podcast with Galaxy Digital CEO Michael Novogratz, Cuban confessed his inclination towards Ethereum. The full article can be found on a financial news website.

news.headline: Sandvik acquires US-based CAM reseller FASTech, boosting position in market - Jan. 3, 2025. #news
news.summary: Sandvik, a Sweden-based company, announced on January 3, 2025, that it has completed the acquisition of the assets of FASTech, a United States reseller of Computer Aided Manufacturing (CAM) solutions within the Mastercam network. This move aims to enhance Sandvik's presence in the CAM market. The acquisition of FASTech's assets signifies a strategic step in expanding Sandvik's capabilities and reach in the industry. This transaction marks a significant development for Sandvik as it consolidates its position in the CAM sector by integrating FASTech's operations.

Trina Storage ranks top in BNEF's 2024 survey for energy storage systems with cutting-edge products and financial stability.
news.summary: In Munich on January 3, 2025, Trina Storage has been recognized for its exceptional performance in BloombergNEF's Energy Storage System Cost Survey 2024. The company has secured a leading position due to its advanced products, innovation in technology, integrated solutions, and financial strength. Trina's impressive ranking highlights its commitment to excellence in the energy storage sector.

news.headline: TAL Education Group to announce Q3 FY2025 results on January 23, 2025, for the quarter ended November 30, 2024.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, TAL Education Group revealed that it will disclose its unaudited financial outcomes for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025 closing on November 30, 2024. TAL, a prominent smart learning solutions provider in China, is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol "TAL." This update was announced in Beijing.

news.headline: Singapore-based tech company Strutt reveals Strutt ev¹ at CES 2025, aiming to revolutionize personal mobility.
news.summary: A technology company based in Singapore, Strutt, is preparing to revolutionize personal mobility with the upcoming release of the Strutt ev¹. This innovative vehicle is designed to provide a convenient solution for individuals seeking independent living. Scheduled to be introduced at the Consumer Electronics Show (CES) in 2025.

China's leader Xi Jinping acknowledges economic challenges, highlighting government growth targets in New Year's address.
news.summary: During his New Year's speech, Xi Jinping acknowledged the slowing economy, a rare move for him, while also reaffirming the government's growth goals.

news.headline: Turkey's inflation decelerated beyond projections in December, surprising analysts.
Kia America achieves record-breaking annual sales with 796,488 vehicles sold, marking 7 years of consecutive growth.
news.summary: Six Kia models have set a new annual sales record, contributing to a total of 796,488 vehicles sold in the U.S. The company has achieved seven years of continuous growth in retail sales. Electric vehicle sales have surged by 74%, while sales of SUVs and utility lineup have seen an 8% increase year-over-year. This success highlights the strong performance of Kia in the market, setting new milestones for the company.

news.headline: Discover top 10 island hotels worldwide for 2025 - from the Caribbean to Asia. Exquisite views and amenities await!
news.summary: In a recent study, it was found that over 50% of adults in the United States have received at least one dose of the COVID-19 vaccine. This milestone comes as the country continues to ramp up its vaccination efforts, with over 200 million doses administered so far. Additionally, over 30% of adults are now fully vaccinated. The progress in the vaccination campaign has led to a steady decrease in daily reported cases and hospitalizations across the nation. Public health experts emphasize the importance of continued vaccination to reach herd immunity and effectively control the spread of the virus.

news.summary: P&R Measurement is gearing up to debut advanced precision solutions and interactive innovations powered by artificial intelligence at the CES 2025 event in Las Vegas. Their goal is to support international creators and shape the advancement of smart manufacturing. The showcase will take place on January 3, 2025, underscoring P&R Measurement's commitment to cutting-edge technology and driving innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Harbin Electric reaches milestone on Jan 3, 2025, by fabricating world's largest impulse runner on Dec 30.
news.summary: In Harbin, China, on December 30, 2024, Harbin Electric Corporation made a major accomplishment in hydropower technology by successfully welding and manufacturing the world's biggest component. Harbin Electric is renowned globally for its expertise in power generation technology.

news.headline: South Korea fails to arrest President Yoon in standoff. Daybreak: Europe 01/03/2025 by Bloomberg.
news.summary: South Korean investigators were unsuccessful in apprehending President Yoon during a confrontation. The incident occurred on the morning of March 1, 2025. The clash was reported in Europe at Daybreak. There were no arrests made in the standoff.

Yarbo to showcase upgrades to its modular yard care robot at CES 2025 in Las Vegas, including latest Lawnmower, Blower.

news.headline: China's "Beautiful Rivers" initiative highlights stunning rivers, led by Ministry of Water Resources, PRNewswire reports.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, in Beijing, the "Beautiful Rivers" campaign is being led by the General Office and the Department of River and Lake Management within the Ministry of Water Resources. This initiative is being supported by China Water Resources News and the Development Research Center of the Ministry.

news.headline: Mayo Clinic partners with SciBase to test Nevisense for skin disorders; SciBase (STO: SCIB) leading developer.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, SciBase Holding AB (STO: SCIB), a prominent developer of augmented intelligence solutions for skin disorders, disclosed its collaboration with Mayo Clinic, a top US hospital. The partnership aims to enhance pigmented lesion digital workflows.

news.headline: Tata Elxsi teams up with Qualcomm to develop VSoCs for Snapdragon Digital Chassis for future mobility. Live demo at CES 2025.
news.summary: Tata Elxsi is looking to partner with Qualcomm to develop VSoCs for the Snapdragon Digital Chassis, focusing on cloud-native app development. Their AVENIR™ SDV suite will be featured at CES 2025 with a live demo, illustrating their advancements in this field. This collaboration and exhibition mark significant progress in the tech sector, highlighting innovative solutions in cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: GRIT Bio appoints Jie Jia, Ph.D., as COO in Shenzhen, China. Leading in cell therapy globally.
news.summary: The global cell therapy leader, Shenzhen GRIT Biotechnology Co., Ltd., based in China, has appointed Dr. Jie Jia as the Chief Operating Officer (COO) on January 3, 2025. Dr. Jia has over 20 years of experience in the field.

news.headline: Cook Smarts launches a new meal planning app, focused on reducing food waste, released today in Apple Store.
news.summary: A new iOS mobile app has been launched by Cook Smarts LLC, a meal planning service based in Sunnyvale, California, on January 3, 2025. This app aims to reduce food waste and streamline daily meal planning to save time and mental energy for users. The service emphasizes customization and sustainability to promote a healthy lifestyle. This launch signifies a step towards minimizing food waste and making meal planning more convenient for users.

news.headline: The Or Foundation donates $1 million to Kantamanto Market relief efforts after a fire. Support needed to revitalize market.
news.summary: An environmental justice group is urging the fashion sector to aid in the rejuvenation of ACCRA, Ghana's massive secondhand marketplace which was ravaged by a destructive fire. The fire significantly impacted Kantamanto Market, the globe's largest hub for secondhand clothing. The call for assistance comes following the recent incident on Jan. 3, 2025. The organization is seeking support to help revive the marketplace and assist the local community. The magnitude of the fire's impact is substantial, affecting the livelihoods of numerous vendors and disrupting the global secondhand clothing market. The organization is emphasizing the importance of collaboration and solidarity to rebuild and restore the marketplace to its former state. It highlights the urgency of the situation and the need for immediate action. The fashion industry's support is crucial in this effort to revitalize the marketplace and aid the affected sellers and residents.

news.headline: BE OPEN Art announces winners of Regional Art Competition in Southern Africa; organized by Elena Baturina's humanitarian initiative.
news.summary: In Lugano, Switzerland, on January 3, 2025, BE OPEN Art, an internet art platform established by the BE OPEN think tank, a charitable organization created by Elena Baturina, an Austrian entrepreneur and philanthropist, is prepared to reveal the outcomes of the final phase of BE's initiative.

KB Home to report Q4 earnings on Jan. 9, anticipated $2.46 EPS and $1.99 billion revenue, up from last year.
news.summary: KB Home (NYSE:KBH) is set to announce its Q4 earnings on Jan. 9 after markets close. Analysts predict earnings per share to be $2.46, up from $1.85 last year. Revenue is forecasted to be $1.99 billion, a significant increase from $1.67 billion last year. In Q3, revenue was reported at $1.75 billion, surpassing analyst expectations of $1.728 billion, with earnings per share at $2.04, higher than the estimated $2.02. Following this update, KB Home's shares dropped by 1.6%, closing at $64.64. For more details and analyst ratings, visit Benzinga Pro.

news.headline: S&P 500 drops for 5th day, Tesla plunges 6%, Fear and Greed index remains in 'Fear' zone; U.S. jobless claims at 211,000.
news.summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated a rise in fear levels, while remaining in the "Fear" zone on Thursday. U.S. stocks closed lower, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite experiencing a five-day decline, marking their longest losing streak since April. Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) shares dropped by more than 6% on Thursday after releasing fourth-quarter production and delivery data. U.S. initial jobless claims decreased by 9,000 from the previous week to 211,000 in the final week of 2024, surpassing market predictions of 222,000. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Stock futures up, 3 stocks to watch Friday:- GeneDx Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: WGS), COO named, shares down 2.7% at $77.46- Lifecore Biomedical, Inc. (NASDAQ: LFCR), beat Q2 expectations- Mention of another stock- See more on Benzinga.com
news.summary: US stock futures are up this Friday morning. Investors may turn their attention to GeneDx Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: WGS) as Bryan Dechairo has been appointed Chief Operating Officer. Following the news, GeneDx shares dropped by 2.7% to $77.46 during after-hours trading. On the other hand, Lifecore Biomedical, Inc. (NASDAQ: LFCR) surpassed expectations in its second-quarter results, showing a quarterly loss of 25 cents per share. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Tineco unveiled cutting-edge floor care tech at CES 2025, including smart vacuum, floor washer, and carpet cleaner.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, Tineco, a prominent player in smart floor care solutions, is participating in CES for the fourth year in a row. They are highlighting advancements in smart cleaning technologies that have set new standards in the industry. Tineco debuted the initial smart vacuum in 2018, subsequently introducing the world's first smart floor washer in 2019 and intelligent carpet cleaning in 2022. This demonstrates Tineco's dedication to revolutionizing cleaning practices with innovative designs at CES.

news.headline: Roadzen Inc. priced a best-efforts offering of 2,222,300 ordinary shares at $2.25/share, aiming to raise $5 million in gross proceeds.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, Roadzen Inc. (Nasdaq: RDZN), a prominent player in AI within the insurance and mobility sectors, revealed the pricing details of a best-efforts offering. This offering consists of 2,222,300 ordinary shares priced at $2.25 per share for a total of approximately $5,000,000 in gross proceeds. The Company is offering all of the ordinary shares, with the closing of the offering expected on January 6, 2025, pending the fulfillment of standard closing conditions.

news.headline: China restricts battery exports; Yoon's arrest dropped in Middle East & Africa news on 01/03/2025 via Bloomberg.
news.summary: Restrictions on battery exports from China have been implemented, impacting the global market. Additionally, the planned arrest of Yoon has been canceled. For more details on these developments in the Middle East & Africa region, refer to the January 3, 2025, Bloomberg report.
